article.title: Uber SDE-1 OA Experience || CodeSignal
article.content:
Hi Everyone,
Just wanted to share my experience with Uber’s OA for the SDE-1 role — might help others preparing for it!

Applied via: Uber Careers portal
Got OA link: Around a week after applying
Role: SDE-1
Platform: CodeSignal
Mode: Online proctored (camera + screen monitored)

OA Format:

    3 coding questions
        - i. Scheduling Problem
        - ii. Riders Grouping Problem
        - iii. Graph DP based Question(hard level)

    Mostly medium to hard level

    Topics: Strings, Greedy, Graph and Dynamic Programming

I solved 2 out of 3 Questions fully, The last one was a tricky DP problem, I ran out of time.


Tips:

- Practice string problems and greedy logic on LeetCode(Leetcode 75 / Top Interview 150)

- Brush up on DP patterns

- Stay calm during the test

Good luck to everyone preparing!
